description_long: This humanoid robot features a robust, industrial design with a matte black metallic exterior and visible mechanical joints. Its head is equipped with two distinct eyes—one blue and one red—suggesting advanced visual sensors, and it has two antenna-like structures protruding from the top. The torso is broad and armored, with a green triangular light on the chest and metallic accents throughout. The arms and legs are segmented with visible bolts and reinforced joints, indicating a high degree of articulation and strength. The back displays red lights and additional mechanical detailing, while the overall build is sturdy and utilitarian, suitable for urban environments. The robot's design is both functional and slightly intimidating, with a focus on durability and sensor integration.
description: A sturdy, black humanoid robot with mechanical joints, colored sensor eyes, and antennae, featuring armored plating and illuminated accents.
description_view_0: Side view showing the robot's profile, antenna, and detailed arm and leg joints.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the two colored eyes, green chest light, and symmetrical arm positioning.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the profile and mechanical detailing of the first side.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying red lights on the back, mechanical spine, and reinforced leg joints.
attribute_pose: The robot is standing upright with arms relaxed at its sides and legs straight, head facing forward.
attribute_clothing_style: No clothing; the robot is covered in integrated metallic and plastic panels with illuminated accents.
attribute_facial_features: The face features two prominent eyes—one blue and one red—set in a mechanical head with no visible mouth or nose, and two antennae extending upward.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have multiple visible hinge and rotary joints at the shoulders, elbows, wrists, hips, knees, and ankles, allowing for a wide range of motion; limbs appear robust and flexible.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Visible sensors include two camera-like eyes on the head and possible additional sensors integrated into the chest and back lights.
